data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Test file complete. Structure: shebang, set -uo pipefail, REPO_ROOT/DSO_PLUGIN_DIR setup, source assert.sh, 3 test blocks using _snapshot_fail + assert_eq + assert_pass_if_clean pattern, print_summary. test_validate_config_accepts_new_path handles missing validate-config.sh gracefully with SKIP.
